历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated: approximately 11219 → 12913 → 11703 → 10370 → 10843, showing an overall volatile trend with narrow fluctuations in the 10370–10843 range in recent two years; the 2025 baseline is about 10843; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 107 in 2021, 111 in 2022, 109 in 2023, 122 in 2024, and 125 in 2025, with a gradual slight expansion; the 2026 plan is 140, an increase of 15 (+12%) compared to 2025, a significant expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising in recent years: 62nd in 2021 → 64th in 2022 → 64th in 2023 → 68th in 2024 → 63rd in 2025 → 57th in 2026, entering an upward channel, with improved comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2024 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, involving a teacher ethics survey but no major negative public opinion; Douyin heat ranking is 7th overall (high heat), with large short video exposure; education bloggers like Zhang Xuefeng have repeatedly recommended the school as a 'high cost-performance 211', attracting high application attention; Chemical Engineering and Technology (A), Materials Science and Engineering (A-), Chemistry (A-), three major disciplines are all A-class, with outstanding strength in chemical engineering and materials, highly corresponding to the school's engineering experimental classes and science experimental classes, strongly attracting science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Automation continue to have high social popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province increased from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, with sustained significant growth; in 2026, total candidates are 267,900, with Physics Category estimated at about 204,000 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 6% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; slightly lower than the 2024 score of 449, overall stable; Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, with some regional appeal to Fujian candidates; the school's enrollment plan in Fujian accounts for a small proportion (about 125–140 in Physics Category), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 12% expansion of the 2026 Physics Category plan (alleviating competition), the approximately 6% increase in Fujian Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), the school's Soft Science ranking rising to 57th (enhancing attractiveness), and high Douyin heat exposure (boosting attention), the expansion and candidate growth largely offset each other, but the ranking rise and heat increase make competition slightly more intense; based on the 2025 baseline of 10843, the 2026 minimum ranking is expected to move slightly forward to about 11424, with a range of 10924–11924.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking rose to 57th in 2026, continuously improving in recent years, enhancing overall strength and brand effect. In 2024, reputation was neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranked 7th overall (high heat), but high-heat content is mainly in science and engineering, with limited direct appeal to History Category candidates. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in chemical engineering, materials, chemistry, etc. The History Category enrollment majors (Business Administration, Law, Administrative Management, Public Affairs Management, International Economics and Trade) have no directly corresponding A-class discipline support, so disciplinary appeal is moderate.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Business Administration, Law, and other liberal arts majors have stable but polarized social popularity. The number of History Category candidates in Fujian Province decreased from 78,000 in 2021 to 60,000 in 2025, showing an overall downward trend. In 2026, total candidates are 267,900, with an estimated History Category of about 64,000 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 6% from 2025, a slight rebound in candidate scale. The provincial control line was 450 in 2025, up from 431 in 2024, indicating a slightly tighter competitive environment. Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a Beijing-based university, with some regional appeal to Fujian History Category candidates, but its liberal arts majors are few (only 5 majors), offering limited choices.

预测结论.text: Considering the stable History Category plan, a slight increase of about 6% in Fujian History Category candidates, the university's rising ranking but lack of A-class discipline support for liberal arts majors, competition slightly intensifies. Based on the 2025 baseline of 2495, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to move slightly forward to about 2465, with a range of 2021–2909.
